ddls:
CREATE TABLE "green_spaces" (
  "space_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each green space type */,
  "typology" TEXT /* Typology of the green space (e.g., Natural/Semi, Green Corridors, Res Amenity, Public Parks, Play Areas) */,
  "num_sites" INTEGER /* Number of sites of this green space type */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Total land area of this green space type in hectares */,
  "percent_total_area" REAL /* Percentage of total green space area */,
  "ha_per_1000_population" REAL /* Land area per 1,000 population in hectares */,
  "average_quality_score" REAL /* Average quality score of this green space type */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the green space type was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the green space type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("space_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "space_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the green space type */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the site in hectares */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the site contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the site contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_space_id FOREIGN KEY ("space_id") REFERENCES green_spaces ("space_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the maintenance activity took place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., mowing, planting, cleaning) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., planned, completed, delayed) */,
  "assignee" TEXT /* Name of the person or team assigned to the activity */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the feedback is related */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or suggestion */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the city or site administrators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Quality score of the site (0-100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the assessor */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor */,
  "assessor_role" TEXT /* Role of the assessor (e.g., staff, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_quality_assessments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., visit, event) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the feature is located */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., playground, garden, basketball court) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_features_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival, workshop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the policy applies */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_policies_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
